testcase.name: OpenLibrary Automation Suite › 1. Open homepage and verify site loads
testcase.system-out:
🌐 Navigating to OpenLibrary homepage... ⏱️ Page fully loaded in 10136ms ✅ Verifying homepage elements... ✅ Homepage verification complete

testcase.name: OpenLibrary Automation Suite › 2. Search for Biology books
testcase.system-out:
🌐 Navigating to OpenLibrary homepage... ⏱️ Page fully loaded in 4254ms 🔍 Searching for: "Biology" ⏱️ Search completed in 18946ms 📋 Checking search results visibility... ✅ Search results page confirmed Collected 20 titles from page 1
[[ATTACHMENT|home-OpenLibrary-Automation-Suite-2-Search-for-Biology-books-chromium\test-finished-1.png]]

testcase.name: OpenLibrary Automation Suite › 3. Navigate to page 2 with human verification handling
testcase.system-out:
📄 Initiating navigation to page 2... ⬇️ Scrolling to bottom of page... ✅ Scrolled to bottom 👆 Clicking page 2 button... ✅ Page 2 button clicked ✅ Navigation to page 2 completed
[[ATTACHMENT|home-OpenLibrary-Automatio-9d493-human-verification-handling-chromium\test-finished-1.png]]

testcase.name: OpenLibrary Automation Suite › 4. Verify page 2 URL and human verification completion
testcase.system-out:
🔗 Verifying page 2 URL... ⚠️ Bot detection triggered - handling human verification 🎯 Target URL: /search?q=Biology&mode=everything&page=2 🔍 Checking for human verification... 🤖 Human verification detected - clicking verify button... ✅ Verification button clicked ⏳ Waiting for redirect to page 2... ✅ Successfully verified page 2 URL! 📍 Current URL: https://openlibrary.org/search?q=Biology&mode=everything&page=2
[[ATTACHMENT|home-OpenLibrary-Automatio-3a70f-man-verification-completion-chromium\test-finished-1.png]]

testcase.name: OpenLibrary Automation Suite › 5. Verify page 2 results differ from page 1 results
testcase.system-out:
Page 1 titles (20): 1. Biology 2. Campbell biology 3. Molecular biology of the cell 4. Biology: California Edition 5. Objective NCERT at your FINGERTIPS for NEET-AIIMS - Biology 6. Biology 7. Biology: Concepts and Applications 8. Biology: Concepts & Connections 9. Human biology 10. Molecular biology of amphibian development 11. Molecular biology of the gene 12. Marine biology 13. Cell and molecular biology: concepts and experiments 14. International Review of Cell and Molecular Biology 15. Botany: An Introduction to Plant Biology 16. Essential cell biology 17. Developmental biology 18. Behave: The Biology of Humans at Our Best and Worst 19. Introductory plant biology 20. Brock biology of microorganisms
Page 2 titles (20): 1. Cell and molecular biology 2. Campbell Biology 3. Essential biology 4. Advances in Medicine and Biology 5. Brock, biology of microorganisms. 6. Molecular cell biology 7. Biology of plants 8. Biology 9. Ecology and field biology. 10. Complete NEET Guide Biology 11. Biology 12. Molecular cell biology 13. A short guide to writing about biology 14. Cell biology 15. Essential Biology with Physiology 16. Biology 17. Biology: How Life Works 18. Biology 19. Campbell Biology: Concepts and Connections 20. Biology Textbook for Class - 12 - 12083
Matching titles count: 2
[[ATTACHMENT|home-OpenLibrary-Automatio-8120b--differ-from-page-1-results-chromium\test-finished-1.png]]

testcase.name: OpenLibrary Automation Suite › 6. Validate search API returns correct limit and numFound
OpenLibrary Automation Suite › 7. Sort by First published and validate against API
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: OpenLibrary Automation Suite › 8. Filter by Spanish language and verify results update
